# OLED icon bitmaps for connection and daemon status rows.
#
# Edit only the 0/1 rows when tuning the tiny OLED icons by eye.
# Each icon must have exactly 8 rows.  Width is taken from the row length.
# 1 = lit pixel, 0 = off pixel.
#
# http://domainatnifty.private.coocan.jp/icon-editor/
#

# bt: Bluetooth output / Bluetooth status icon
bt:
001000
001100
101010
011100
101010
001100
001000
000000

# usb: USB gadget output icon
usb:
0110000
0000000
1111000
1001000
1001000
1001010
0110010
0001100

# pi: Raspberry Pi / local uinput output icon
pi:
11000
10100
10100
11010
10000
10010
00000
00000

# auto: Automatic output selection icon
auto:
0110000
1010101
1110101
1010111
0000000
1110111
0100101
0100111

# wifi0: Wi-Fi available but not connected
wifi0:
000000
001000
001000
001000
000000
001000
000000
000000

# wifi3: Connected Wi-Fi icon shown on the OLED Ready screen
wifi3:
000000
111110
000000
011100
000000
001000
000000
000000

# mtx: matrixd daemon status icon
mtx:
10000100
11001100
11111100
11001101
11001010
00000101
00011000
00000000

# core: logicd-core daemon status icon
core:
00111100
01000010
10011001
10011111
10011001
01000010
00111100
00000000

# cmp: logicd-companion daemon status icon
cmp:
00111000
01111100
11000110
11000000
11000110
01111100
00111000
00000000

# lgc: legacy combined logicd daemon status icon
lgc:
10000000
10000000
10000000
10000000
10000000
11111110
00000000
00000000

# led: ledd daemon status icon
led:
00111000
00111000
01111100
00101000
00101000
00101000
00100000
00000000

# out: outputd daemon status icon
out:
01111100
10000010
10111010
10100010
10000010
10000010
01111100
00000000

# uid: uidd daemon status icon
uid:
11001100
11001100
11001100
11001110
11111000
01110110
00000110
00000000

# btd: btd daemon status icon
btd:
00010000
00011000
01010100
00111000
01010100
00011000
00010000
00000000

# web: httpd daemon status icon
web:
00111100
01000110
10111101
10100101
10111101
01000010
00111100
00000000

# hid: HID broker daemon status icon (native hidloom-hidd or legacy usbd)
hid:
01110000
01010000
11111000
11011000
11010110
01100110
00011000
00000000

# vial: viald daemon status icon
vial:
00111100
01100110
11001011
11001011
11010011
01100110
00111100
00000000
